name: Double Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, and cloves in a bowl. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, beat together oil and brown sugar until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add melted chocolate to the wet ingredients, stirring until smooth.
4. Pour in the dry ingredients alternately with milk (if needed), stirring gently until just combined.
5. Fold in grated zucchini, chocolate chips, and chopped nuts.
6. Grease a Bundt pan and pour in the batter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Frost as desired, especially with a chocolate glaze. Serve warm.
